name: I'm in the garage of a large house
description: I'm in the garage of a large house
hints: The garage of the large house at the east cul-de-sac. There's a small toolbox here.
GET TOOLBOX - it may contain useful items. LOOK TOOLBOX or OPEN TOOLBOX to see what's inside.
GET TOOLBOX for items inside. SOUTH returns to the east cul-de-sac (room 10).
notes: Garage of the east cul-de-sac large house. Contains a small toolbox with potential items inside. SOUTH returns to the east cul-de-sac (room 10).
